title: Evaluation of Lung Permeability by FITC-Dextran Intravenous Injection
author: Laura Ruiz Remolina
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.j8hcrt6

steps.instruction: 1-We place the chamber connected to the nebulizer in a laminar flow hood
2-We load 10 ml of the 5 mg / ml dilution of LPS into the nebulizer vessel
3-We put in the nebulization chamber the mice
4-Turn on the nebulizer and wait 30 minutes, making sure the LPS is misting (we will see droplets condense into the tube coming out of the gas chamber).
5-We turned off the nebulizer and left the mice 10 minutes longer inside the chamber.

6-After 40 minutes, we took the mice out of the camera and took them to the cage. o We must be careful and throw the gloves with which we have touched the nebulization chamber and anything else that has been in contact with the LPS in a garbage bag that we will close before throwing. o Wash gas chamber and nebulizer to remove LPS debris.
7-After 24 hours, we continue: Dextran: - Anesthetize the mice with forane. - Inject 100μl of FITC-Dextran (25mg / ml) into the retroorbital sinus.
8-30 minutes later, we sacrificed the mouse with CO2
9- We isolated the trachea, making sure to clean the conjunctiva and the surrounding fat well.
10-With the help of a pair of tweezers, we pass the thread under the trachea, and we make a bundle, without squeezing.
11-With the scissors make a small cut in the trachea, and put the tip of the needle with round tip.
12-We tighten the knot to make sure the needle does not come out of the trachea. We make a second knot tightening.
13-We do bronchoalveolar lavage by gradually introducing into the lungs 500ul of heparinized PBS 1X, we will see how the chest of the mouse swells.
14-We collect the washing slowly, it can help raise and tilt the mouse body slightly. o It is normal to pick up only about 300-400ul of washing, partly because of the dead volume of the needle.
15-Centrifuged for 10 min at 300G and 4 ° C - We performed a thoracotomy and cut the cava
16-We collect blood with a heparinized syringe, we reserve in ice.

17-We collected the supernatant and measured the fluorescence of the plasma (1:20 dilution) and of the BALF (100 μL) in a fluorimeter (CIC) with an excitation wave of 485 nm, and an emission wave of 528 nm.

18-Finally, we corrected the concentration of FITC-Dextran in BALF and lung by the concentration in blood: (FITC-Dextran Fluorescence in BALF) / (FITC-Dextran Fluorescence in Blood) (Fluorescence FITC-Dextran in homogenized lung) / (Fluorescence FITC-Dextran in blood)
